entries.label: Is the tank in Vehicle traffice area?
Type of cover over the UST:
What type of overfill device is present?
Is the overfill device in working order?
Is the bucket free of water and debris?
Is ATG working and properly programmed?
What type of alarms are present?
What type of leak detection is present?
What is the condition of the entry boots?
Are the sump sensors in working order?
What shape are the manholes in?
Do the manholes need to be painted?
Are there dispensers or suction pumps present?
What type of dispenser/pumps are they?
What condition are the sumps in?
Is there a sump sensor present?
Is the sump sensor positioned correctly?
Are shear valves at proper elevation, secured & anchored?
What is the condition of the panels?
Are there lights in the dispensers?
Does the UST have interstitial monitoring?
What type of interstitial monitorig is present?
Is the system in working order?
What type of Stage I is present?
What type of Stage II is present?
Is the Stage II connected and in working order?
Are manholes properly painted per API color code?
What is the overall appearance of the site?
Is the fuel island kept in a clean manner?
Is a fire extinghuisher on site?
Are Operations and Maintenance manuals on site?
Are copies of the tightness test on site?
Are copies of the training documents on file?
Is a copy of the Spill Prevention, Control and Countermeasure Plan onsite?
Are spill control containment barrels present, labeled, and stocked?
Were any spills noted at time of inspection?
Is tank contents and size displayed?
Is there an emergency shut off switch/sign present?
Are 'no smoking' and 'stop engine when fueling' signs present?
How many monitoring wells are present?
What is the condition of the wells?
Is there a locking cap installed on pipe?
Are the manholes properly marked per API?
Is the tank in Vehicle traffice area?
